---
title: "Research"
toc: true
toc-location: right
toc-title: " "
---

## Published & Forthcoming

::: {.pub-entry}
**Reinsurance Purchases and the Corporate Lifecycle**  
With [Coauthors].  
*Journal of Corporate Finance*, forthcoming.  
[[Pre-print](#)] [[Published](#)] [[Replication](#)]
:::

::: {.pub-entry}
**[Paper Title]**  
With [Coauthors].  
*[Journal Name]*, [Year], [Volume](Issue), pp–pp.  
[[Pre-print](#)] [[Published](#)] [[Replication](#)]
:::

## Working Papers

::: {.pub-entry}
**Enterprise Risk Management and Workplace Safety**  
With [Coauthors].  
*Working paper*, revised [Month Year].  
[[Pre-print](#)] [[Slides](#)]

> Using propensity-score matching and difference-in-differences, we show that ERM adoption is associated with approximately a 31% reduction in workplace injuries.
:::

::: {.pub-entry}
**Electoral Uncertainty and Insurer Outcomes**  
With [Coauthors].  
*Working paper*, [Month Year].  
[[Pre-print](#)]
:::

::: {.pub-entry}
**Mandated Insurers and Pricing in Florida's Homeowners Market**  
With [Coauthors].  
*Working paper*, [Month Year].
:::

## Work in Progress

- **Loss Reserving and Workforce Dynamics** — using Revelio Labs workforce data to test whether workforce contraction predicts adverse reserve development.
- **TCJA, Tax Function Convexity, and Corporate Hedging** — XBRL-based extraction from SEC EDGAR filings.
- **Board Risk Oversight Delegation** — LLM-based analysis of SEC proxy statement disclosures.

## Selected Presentations

- [Conference], [Location], [Year]
- Risk Theory Society Annual Meeting, FSU, 2025
- FSU RMI Research Symposium, Tampa, 2026

## Service & Editorial

- Editorial role, *Journal of Risk and Insurance*
- ARIA Kulp-Wright Book Award Committee, 2025
- Organizer, FSU RMI Research Symposium (2026) and Risk Theory Society Annual Meeting (2025)
